reviews.review_description: While medical device training isnt exactly a "fun" thing to do, i can't believe how much fun I have anyway! There's just an undeniable cool factor in getting to use the hand tracking and the passthrough. Truly exciting to see what the future of augmented reality could look like!

reviews.review_title: Hand tracking is amazing! great concept
reviews.review_description: I really like the use of hand tracking and augmented reality passthrough where I can see the room around me. The code cart training modules are very cool concept. I could see this being a great way for traveling nurses to get familiar with a new hospitals setup. Opening the drawers and picking up items without a controller is very smooth. Amazing idea!
